action.reasoning: Observation: Best eval AUC 0.7663 with 7-model ensemble. ~7 min left, 12 iters. Analysis: Need more diverse, high-quality models. Decision: Train 3-4 more models with different configs (larger hidden, different dropout, GRU) and add best to ensemble.
